title: Daily Briefing — Wednesday, May 27
tldr: A funding and corporate-news day, condensed. May 27 was a record raise, an office opening, and an analyst placement — none of it a craft technique.
Nothing here is a non-technical, do-it-today play with a verifiable link, so it's kept short rather than padded.

blocks.p: Funding scale and vendor positioning are context, not a runnable move. For the durable techniques from this period, see the two weekly digests.

sources: No run-it-today play survived re-grading for this date; entry condensed to keep the history honest.
